title: suicidal attention seekers
author: june
body:
if you're gonna fucking commit suicide don't fucking post it for the sake of larping OR attention seeking you fucking chuds. genuinely if you think people truly care, they don't. no matter how genuine they seem. 90% of you fuckwits don't even do it anyways. YOU'RE THE REASON WHY NO ONE TREATS SUICIDE PROPERLY. dumbasses

> note y'all are fucking fat fugly chuds "BUZZWORD BUZZWORD" 
genuinely stfu
